title: Ulta Beauty 1Q results edge past estimates but stock price not looking good
text: Ulta Beauty (NASDAQ:ULTA), Inc saw its first-quarter 2023 revenue rise 12.3% year over year to $2.63 billion, while its earning per share (EPS) for the period increased to $6.88 from $6.30 a year earlier. Analysts expected EPS of $6.82 on revenue of $2.62 billion, according to the Zacks Consensus Estimate.

title: Can ULTA's Defensive Product Line Stand Against This Down Cycle

title: Ulta Beauty (ULTA) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates

title: Ulta Beauty Sales Grow 12.3% Although Theft Is A Serious Concern
text: Ulta Beauty CEO Dave Kimbell discussed the company's first-quarter results, with sales up 12.3% compared to last year. However, the company has experienced higher levels of organized retail crime which is a concern for workers and a drain on profits.

title: Ulta Beauty shares fall after same-store sales miss
text: Shares of Ulta Beauty Inc. ULTA, +0.77% tumbled 8.2% after hours on Thursday after the beauty-products and salon chain reported first-quarter same-store sales that just missed expectations and stuck with its full-year same-store sales outlook, amid what management called an “evolving” consumer backdrop. The company reported net income of $347.1 million, or $6.88 a share, compared with $331.4 million, or $6.30 a share, in the same quarter last year.
